body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/bills/oboPayConfirm 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/bills/oboPayConfirm 
 ## 接口描述 
对外部支付成功或支付失败的单据支付明细，可以通过回调进行付款成功或失败的状态确认。
- 如果是单据编号，则会把单据下的所有待支付的明细进行付款状态变更；
- 如果是明细号，则会把此付款明细进行付款状态变更。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"billId","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AEid","exampleValue":"20220000000000000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"payIndex","label":"%E4%BB%98%E6%AC%BE%E8%A1%8C","exampleValue":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"payFinishTime","required":false,"label":"%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98%E5%AE%8C%E6%88%90%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","maxLength":"19","desc":"%20%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BA%EF%BC%9Ayyyy-MM-dd%20HH%3Amm%3Ass%0A%0A%E7%A1%AE%E8%AE%A4%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%B3%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0operationFlag%EF%BC%8C%E6%88%96operationFlag%E4%B8%BA%22SUCCESS%22%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E5%BF%85%E9%A1%BB%E4%BC%A0%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"2022-10-10%2012%3A23%3A12"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"empId","label":"%E9%97%A8%E6%88%B7%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"U0000","desc":"%20empId%E3%80%81empNumber%E3%80%81empPhone%E4%B8%89%E8%80%85%E9%80%89%E4%B8%80"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"empNumber","label":"%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"A1234","desc":"%20empId%E3%80%81empNumber%E3%80%81empPhone%E4%B8%89%E8%80%85%E9%80%89%E4%B8%80"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"empPhone","label":"%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E6%89%8B%E6%9C%BA%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"18888888888","desc":"%20empId%E3%80%81empNumber%E3%80%81empPhone%E4%B8%89%E8%80%85%E9%80%89%E4%B8%80"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"operationFlag","label":"%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","exampleValue":"SUCCESS","desc":"%20%E4%B8%8D%E5%A1%AB%E6%97%B6%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%BA%E7%A1%AE%E8%AE%A4%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F-SUCCESS%0A%0A%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE%E5%80%BC%E5%8F%AA%E6%9C%89%20%E7%A1%AE%E8%AE%A4%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F-%22SUCCESS%22%E5%92%8C%E7%A1%AE%E8%AE%A4%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5-%E2%80%9CFAIL%E2%80%9D"}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"payAccount","label":"%E4%BB%98%E6%AC%BE%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depoName","label":"%E4%BB%98%E6%AC%BE%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E5%BC%80%E6%88%B7%E5%90%8D","maxLength":"50","exampleValue":"%E5%BC%A0%E4%B8%89"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depoBank","label":"%E4%BB%98%E6%AC%BE%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E5%BC%80%E6%88%B7%E8%A1%8C%E8%81%94%E8%A1%8C%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"102100000021"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"acctNo","label":"%E4%BB%98%E6%AC%BE%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E8%B4%A6%E5%8F%B7","maxLength":"30","desc":"%20%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%97%E3%80%81%E5%AD%97%E6%AF%8D%E3%80%81%E4%B8%AD%E5%88%92%E7%BA%BF","exampleValue":"11111111111111111111"}}],"open":false},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"receiveAccount","label":"%E6%94%B6%E6%AC%BE%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depoName","label":"%E6%94%B6%E6%AC%BE%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E5%BC%80%E6%88%B7%E5%90%8D","maxLength":"50","exampleValue":"%E6%9D%8E%E5%9B%9B"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depoBank","label":"%E6%94%B6%E6%AC%BE%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E5%BC%80%E6%88%B7%E8%A1%8C%E8%81%94%E8%A1%8C%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"1051000000017","required":false}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"acctNo","label":"%E6%94%B6%E6%AC%BE%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E8%B4%A6%E5%8F%B7","maxLength":"30","desc":"%20%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%97%E3%80%81%E5%AD%97%E6%AF%8D%E3%80%81%E4%B8%AD%E5%88%92%E7%BA%BF","exampleValue":"11111111111111111"}}],"open":false}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","required":true,"maxLength":"8","label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":"%20true-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%2Cfalse-%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F"}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"data","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"total","label":"%E5%A4%84%E7%90%86%E4%BB%98%E6%AC%BE%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E8%A1%8C%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"successCount","label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E5%A4%84%E7%90%86%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F","exampleValue":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"detail","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E8%AF%A6%E6%83%85"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"oboSeqId","label":"%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E8%A1%8C%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"20220000000000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"payIndex","label":"%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98%E8%A1%8C%E8%A1%8C%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","label":"%E6%A0%87%E8%AE%B0%E6%AF%8F%E4%B8%80%E6%9D%A1%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","label":"%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E7%A1%AE%E8%AE%A4%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F"}}]}]}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求示例
{BaseURL}/api/itrip-gateway/v1/bills/oboPayConfirm?OPAUID=XFT00001
```json
{
    "billId": 2022000000000000,
    "payFinishTime": "2022-10-10 12:23:12",
    "empId":"U0000",
    "empNumber":"A1234",
    "empPhone":"18888888888"
    "operationFlag":"SUCCESS"
}
```
### 返回示例
```json
{
    "data": {
        "total": 1,
        "successCount": 1,
        "detail": [
            {
                "oboSeqId": 1,
                "billId": 2022000000000000
                "payIndex": 1,
                "success": true,
                "message": "确认成功"
            }
        ]
    },
    "success": true,
    "message": "成功"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| **错误码** | **错误描述**        | **备注**                       |
|----------|------------------|-------------------------------|
| 200      | 成功                 | 无                            |

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/bills/oboPayConfirm

接口描述

对外部支付成功或支付失败的单据支付明细，可以通过回调进行付款成功或失败的状态确认。

  • 如果是单据编号，则会把单据下的所有待支付的明细进行付款状态变更；
  • 如果是明细号，则会把此付款明细进行付款状态变更。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数
